reviews.review_description: This puzzle game isn't bad, the puzzles in it are actually pretty good time wasters. However the game is not necessarily targeted towards English speakers. This adds the interesting puzzle of "what is the goal?" to solve. This game also plays as an older vr game in that it does not have the interaction or graphics that other puzzle games are putting out. I can't say the game is bad but it's not much better than a non vr puzzle game app.
